<ANS>
```python
CustomTrainImageInputTransform: T.Compose = T.Compose([
    T.Resize((256, 256)),
    T.RandomHorizontalFlip(p=0.5),
    T.RandomVerticalFlip(p=0.5),
    T.ColorJitter(brightness=0.2, contrast=0.2, saturation=0.2, hue=0.1),
    T.ToTensor(),  # Convert the image to a tensor
    T.Lambda(
      lambda x: x.repeat([3 if (i - x.ndim == -3 and d == 1) else 1 for i, d in enumerate(x.shape)])
    ),
    T.Lambda(lambda x: x[:3] if x.shape[0] > 3 else x),
])
```
</ANS>
